'''George Flanagan Jr''' (born 4 December 2004) is an English professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|fb|sh}} or {{rlp|so}} for the [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]].

==Career==
===Bradford Bulls===
Flanagan made a try-scoring debut for [[Bradford Bulls]] against [[London Broncos]] in July 2022, a game in which his father, [[George Flanagan Sr]], also played.<ref>{{cite web |title=George Flanagan hails son's Bradford Bulls debut |url=https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/sportlatest/20288939.george-flanagan-hails-sons-bradford-bulls-debut/ |website=Bradford Telegraph and Argus |access-date=3 January 2026 |date=20 July 2022}}</ref>

===Huddersfield Giants===
Flanagan Jr. made his debut in round 2 of the [[2025 Super League season]] for the Giants against the [[Leigh Leopards]] in a 24-10 loss.<ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/articles/c62kg9yldw4o |title=Late tries help Leigh see off Huddersfield |publisher=BBC Sport |date=23 February 2025}}</ref><ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/article/4852/round-2-round-up |title=Round 2 Round Up |publisher=Super League |date=23 February 2025}}</ref>

In April 2025 Flanagan Jr signed a new contract with the Giants which will keep him there until 2027.<ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/articles/cy4vvk9xj8lo |title=Youngster Flanagan pens new Huddersfield deal |publisher=BBC Sport |date=9 April 2025}}</ref><ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/huddersfield-giants-tie-down-rising-star-and-complete-loan-deal-for-super-league-hooker-5075690 |title=Huddersfield Giants tie down rising star and complete loan deal for Super League hooker |publisher=Yorkshire Post |first=James |last=O'Brien |date=9 April 2025}}</ref>
